author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Fleet Rentals are LIVE

Put your ships to work or expand your fleet without the full cost of ownership.  

Ship owners can now loan out their spaceships for ATLAS over time, while others can borrow ships to boost their intergalactic operations for less.

We've created two short tutorials to help get you started:
How to loan out your ships: CLICK HERE,How to borrow ships from others: CLICK HERE,
 | Learn more about Fleet Rentals: https://medium.com/star-atlas/introducing-fleet-rentals-in-star-atlas-play-and-earn-your-way-179852b3c99a
 | Fleet Rentals: https://play.staratlas.com/rentals/
